text.tspan: Deal / Application level inside Uncia LOS - flow, UI changes, and Forward controls
BRE eligibility is checked when the deal/application opens. If required, the Credit Eligibility BRE flow runs before Forward approval.
Captures BRE inputs not in LOS
Show result popup with route-back CTA
Do not show Failed Rules or
Show only if returned by BRE
Manual Deviation remains existing Uncia section
Manual Deviation Level updates from existing field
Auto Deviations are not shown when BRE=True
